Outstanding unvested restricted stock units and unvested performance stock units will be accelerated and vest upon confirmation to Secretary of Energy position. The Liberty Energy Inc. Long Term Incentive Plan provides the Compensation Committee the discretion to accelerate the vesting of the RSU/PSUs listed above.  Typically these awards must have 1 year minimum vesting period, but there is an exception that would allow the Committee to vest the 2024 RSU and PSU awards in this situation.  	Filer would be issued shares of Liberty Energy (NYSE:LBRT) upon confirmation, less required withholding taxes.  This would be a “net vest” where some RSUs and PSUs would be forfeited to satisfy the withholding tax, per Liberty’s historical practices. (2018-04-01)

Annual year end performance bonus of about $1,000,000 for 2024 calendar year, payable early 2025.  The 2024 bonus will be paid in accordance with the 2024 Annual Incentive Program adopted by resolutions of the Liberty Energy Inc. Compensation Committee on January 22, 2024.    80% of the bonus is subject to specific performance metrics; 20% of the opportunity is subject to the discretion of the Compensation Committee.  My target bonus for 2024 is $1,070,000. Actual payment can range from 0 to 200% of target, subject to performance of the company. The bonus will be paid in March. (2024-01-01)
I will continue to participate in this defined contribution plan. The plan sponsor will not make further contributions after my separation. (2011-03-01)
I will continue to participate in this defined contribution plan. The plan sponsor will not make further contributions after my separation. (2014-01-01)
I will forfeit my unvested restricted stock units upon separation. (2024-04-01)
I will forfeit my unvested stock options upon separation. I will retain my vested stock options. (2024-06-01)

Wild Basin owns royalties purchased from private landowners and other royalty owners.  NO production royalties have yet been received as natural gas wells have yet to be drilled under the royalty lands. However, the royalty lands are currently under leases to drill held by ExxonMobil Corporation Expand Energy Corporation BPX Energy Inc.
